name: Ordinary Life - Participating
benefits: Lifelong whole life coverage — policy never expires
Eligible for annual policy dividends
Dividends can reduce premiums, increase coverage, or accumulate as cash
Guaranteed cash surrender value grows with time
use_case: Classic whole life protection that rewards long-term policyholders with dividends and growing cash value.

name: Ordinary Life - Non-Participating
benefits: Lifelong whole life coverage with fixed premiums
Guaranteed death benefit paid to named beneficiaries
Guaranteed cash surrender value
Predictable cost — no dividend variability
use_case: Simple, predictable whole life insurance with fixed costs and guaranteed lifetime coverage.

name: 20-Pay Life - Participating
benefits: Premiums paid over 20 years — coverage lasts a lifetime
Eligible for annual policy dividends during pay period
Policy fully paid up after 20 payments
Cash value accumulates throughout the premium period
use_case: Commit to 20 years of premiums and enjoy lifetime protection with dividend participation.

name: 20-Pay Life - Non-Participating
benefits: Premiums paid over 20 years — fixed and guaranteed
Lifelong death benefit after 20 payments
No dividend variability — fully predictable costs
Guaranteed cash surrender value
use_case: A structured whole life plan — pay for 20 years, covered for life, with no premium surprises.

name: 15-Pay Life - Participating

Dividend eligible — builds policy value over time
Policy loans available against cash value
Shorter payment period, more flexibility in later years
use_case: Pay off your life insurance in 15 years and enjoy decades of dividend-earning, loan-ready coverage.

name: 15-Pay Life - Non-Participating
benefits: Fully paid up in 15 years — no further premiums ever

Guaranteed cash value accumulation

name: 10-Pay Life - Participating
benefits: Policy fully paid up in just 10 years

Lifetime death benefit after final payment
Maximum cash value growth after pay period ends

benefits: Fully paid up after 10 premium payments

Guaranteed cash surrender value

name: 15-Year Endowment - Participating

Eligible for annual dividends to grow the fund
Acts as disciplined savings with life coverage built in
Lump sum payout ideal for a specific financial goal
use_case: Save toward a specific 15-year goal — home purchase, education, or business — with life cover included.

name: 15-Year Endowment - Non-Participating
benefits: Guaranteed payout at 15-year maturity
Fixed premiums — no dividend variability

name: 20-Year Endowment - Participating

benefits: Guaranteed lump sum at 20-year maturity

name: 25-Year Endowment - Participating

name: Endowment to Age 65 - Participating

name: Endowment to Age 65 - Non-Participating
benefits: Guaranteed lump sum payout at age 65

name: Life Paid Up at 65

Level premiums throughout the rider term

name: 15-Year Silver Lining
benefits: All premiums returned at end of 15-year term

benefits: All premiums refunded when you reach age 60
